stations.name: Closest station is South Brisbane
stations.walk_minutes_note: Walkable for parts of West End.

buses.note: Bus routes serve West End via Boundary Street, Vulture Street, and Montague Road.

driving.motorway_access: M3 corridor and CBD access via Victoria Bridge.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 5 to 9 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Goodwill Bridge to South Bank and CBD

secondary_state.name: Brisbane State High catchment may apply for parts

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Boundary Street is the suburb's defining cultural and dining strip with cafes, restaurants, bars, and independent retail. South Bank cultural precinct sits across the river.

pockets.name: Boundary Street precinct
pockets.character: Streets close to the Boundary Street strip. Walkability is the proposition.

pockets.name: Riverside / Orleigh Park
pockets.character: Streets close to the river and the parkland.

pockets.name: Montague Road side
pockets.character: Mixed-use redevelopment area with apartment market.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers attracted to the West End cultural and dining feel.
Parts of West End may fall within the Brisbane State High catchment.

verify_flags: BSHS catchment boundary for West End streets
